metodos.codigoOriginal:
With ThisForm
	.loObj.DataInicial = .getDtInicial.Value
	.loObj.DataFinal   = .getDtFinal.Value
	.loObj.Grupo       = .getGrupo.Value
	.loObj.Produto 	   = .getCPros.Value
	.loObj.Linha 	   = .getLin.Value
	.loObj.Fornecedor  = .getFornecedor.Value
	.loObj.Imagem      = (.optImagem.Value = 1)
	.loObj.Tipos	   = .optTipos.Value
	.loObj.Diferenca   = .optDiferencas.Value

	llRet = .loNegocios.Processamento(.loObj)

	If Not llRet
		Return .f.
	EndIf
EndWith
* Fim ***********************************... [TRUNCADO]

=fConfigGeral()

Set Procedure To SigReAto.Prg Additive

Create Cursor csOperacoesE (SelImp l(1), Codigos n(2), Descrs c(30))
Index On Codigos Tag Codigos

Create Cursor csOperacoesS (SelImp l(1), Codigos n(2), Descrs c(30))
Index On Codigos Tag Codigos

Create Cursor csSigCdCeg (lMarca l(1), Grupos c(10), Contas c(10))
Index On Grupos + Contas Tag GruContas

=DoDefault()
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Private llNot

llNot = .f.

With ThisForm
	.loNegocios = CreateObject('cnSigReAto', .Name)

	If (.loNegocios.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		.getDtInicial.Value = Date()
		.getDtFinal.Value   = Date()

		.loObj = CreateObject('Relation')

		.loObj.AddProperty('DataInicial', .getDtInicial.Value)
		.loObj.AddProperty('DataFinal',   .getDtFinal.Value)
		.loObj.AddProperty('Grupo',       [])
		.loObj.AddProperty('Produto',     [])
		.loObj.AddProperty('Linha',       [])
		.loObj.AddProperty('Fornecedor', ... [TRUNCADO]

If (This.Value <> 4) && Se Năo Clicou em Saída
	Select Codigos From csOperacoesE Where SelImp Into Cursor csTmpE
	
	If (Reccount('csTmpE') < 1)
		=Messagebox('Nenhum Tipo de Operaçăo de Entrada Foi Selecionado!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.grdOperacoesE.Column1.SetFocus
		Return .f.
	EndIf
	
	Select Codigos From csOperacoesS Where SelImp Into Cursor csTmpS
	
	If (Reccount('csTmpS') < 1)
		=Messagebox('Nenhum Tipo de Operaçăo de Saida Foi Selecionado!!!', 0+48, '')
		ThisForm.grdOperacoesS.Column1.Se... [TRUNCADO]

analise.funcoesExternas: From csTmpE Where Codigos In,From csTmpS Where Codigos In

metodos.codigoOriginal:
LParameters nButton, nShift, nXCoord, nYCoord

Local SelImp

m.SelImp = Not csOperacoesE.SelImp

Select csOperacoesE
Gather Memvar Fields SelImp
ThisForm.GrdOperacoesE.Refresh

NoDefault
* Fim **************************************************************************************

LParameters nKeyCode, nShiftAltCtrl

Local SelImp

If InList(nKeyCode, 13, 32)
	m.SelImp = (Not csOperacoesE.SelImp)
	Select csOperacoesE
	Gather Memvar Fields SelImp
	ThisForm.GrdOperacoesE.Refresh
	NoDefault
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
NoDefault
Return .f.
Return .f.

LParameters nButton, nShift, nXCoord, nYCoord

Local SelImp

m.SelImp = Not csOperacoesS.SelImp

Select csOperacoesS
Gather Memvar Fields SelImp
ThisForm.GrdOperacoesS.Refresh

NoDefault
* Fim **************************************************************************************

LParameters nKeyCode, nShiftAltCtrl

Local SelImp

If InList(nKeyCode, 13, 32)
	m.SelImp = (Not csOperacoesS.SelImp)
	Select csOperacoesS
	Gather Memvar Fields SelImp
	ThisForm.GrdOperacoesS.Refresh
	NoDefault
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
NoDefault
Return .f.
Return .f.

Update csOperacoesS Set SelImp = (This.Value = 1)
Go Top In csOperacoesS
ThisForm.GrdOperacoesS.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Update csOperacoesE Set SelImp = (This.Value = 1)
Go Top In csOperacoesE
ThisForm.GrdOperacoesE.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Update csSigCdCeg Set lMarca = (This.Value = 1)
Go Top In csSigCdCeg
ThisForm.grdSigCdCeg.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return Empty(ThisForm.getCPros.Value)

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.loNegocios.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdPro', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'DPros', Padr(This.Value, 40), 'Seleçăo', 500)

		loLista.mAddColuna('DPros', '', 'Descriçăo')

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select CPros, DPros, Reffs, CGrus, Linhas, IFors, Ordem, Estos,  ; 	       Imagem, Pvens, Moevs, Entradas, Saidas, Grupos, Margems ; 	  From crImpressao ; 	 Where Ordem = '0000000001' ; 	  Into Cursor Selecao1
Select CPros, Sum(Estoques) as Estoques ; 	  From crImpressao ; 	 Where Estos = 'Total :   ' ; 	 Group By Cpros ; 	  Into Cursor Selecao2
Select a.*, b.Estoques ; 	  From Selecao1 a, Selecao2 b ; 	 Where a.Cpros = b.Cpros ; 	 Order By a.... [TRUNCADO]

Select CPros, DPros, Reffs, CGrus, Linhas, IFors, Ordem, Estos,  ; 	       Imagem, Pvens, Moevs, Entradas, Saidas, Grupos, Margems ; 	  From crImpressao ; 	 Where Ordem = '0000000001' ; 	  Into Cursor Selecao1

Select a.*, b.Estoques ; 	  From Selecao1 a, Selecao2 b ; 	 Where a.Cpros = b.Cpros ; 	 Order By a.... [TRUNCADO]
